message:
🌱 ollama: `/v1/models` OpenAI compatibility API (#1086)

* 🌱 Add ollama: `/v1/models` OpenAI compatibility API mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: update PR URL for ollama#2430 /v1/models OpenAI API

PR #2476 was closed without merge. PR #5007 (merged 2024-07-02)
is the actual fix for the /v1/models OpenAI compatibility API endpoint.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "helm-6794-enable-release-namespace-creation-in-helm3",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "helm: Enable Release Namespace Creation in Helm3",
+    "description": "Enable Release Namespace Creation in Helm3. Requested by 61+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current helm setup",
+        "description": "Verify your helm version and configuration:\n```bash\nhelm version --short\n```\nThis feature requires a working helm installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review helm configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant helm configuration:\n### Overview\n`Helm2` provided support for the Release namespace `{{ .Release.Namespace }}` via `--namespace` option if the release namespace did not exist."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Enable Release Namespace Creation in Helm3",
+        "description": "### Overview\nCurrently, in Helm3 there is no way to create Release Namespace during helm chart installation.\n\n### Change\nImplement functionality to support Release Namespace creation during helm chart install.\nWhile this PR is marked as Proof of Concept (POC) - it attempts at a fully functional\n```yaml\n{{- if and .Release.Namespace (.Values.createReleaseNamespace | default false) -}}\napiVersion: v1\nkind: Namespace\nmetadata:\n  name: {{ .Release.Namespace }}\n  annotations:\n    my-annoation: {{ .Values.MyAnnotation }}\n  labels:\n    release: {{ .Release.Name }}\n    my-other-label: other-label\n{{- end -}}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Enable Release Namespace Creation in Helm3\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "### Overview\nCurrently, in Helm3 there is no way to create Release Namespace during helm chart installation.\n\n### Change\nImplement functionality to support Release Namespace creation during helm chart install.\nWhile this PR is marked as Proof of Concept (POC) - it attempts at a fully functional solution.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "{{- if and .Release.Namespace (.Values.createReleaseNamespace | default false) -}}\napiVersion: v1\nkind: Namespace\nmetadata:\n  name: {{ .Release.Namespace }}\n  annotations:\n    my-annoation: {{ .Values.MyAnnotation }}\n  labels:\n    release: {{ .Release.Name }}\n    my-other-label: other-label\n{{- end -}}",
+        "Error: bad flag syntax: -----END\nError: plugin \"namespace\" exited with error"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "helm",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "helm"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/helm/helm/issues/6794",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/helm/helm",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/helm/helm/pull/6795"
+    },
+    "reactions": 61,
+    "comments": 48,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "helm"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working helm installation or development environment."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-14T06:17:36.820Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "ollama-2430-v1-models-openai-compatibility-api",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "ollama: `/v1/models` OpenAI compatibility API",
+    "description": "`/v1/models` OpenAI compatibility API. Requested by 17+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current ollama setup",
+        "description": "Verify your ollama version and configuration:\n```bash\nollama --version\n```\nThis feature requires a working ollama installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review ollama configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant ollama configuration:\nIt's great to have OpenAI compatibility API! \nUnfortunately many applications require additional endpoints to work properly."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for `/v1/models` OpenAI compatibility API",
+        "description": "Add openaAI API **v1/models** endpoint compatibility.\n\nSee spec at: https://platform.openai.com/docs/api-reference/models/list\n\nPersonally I am not so sure about putting the ListModelsHandlerOpenAI method into the router file, however the original ollama ListModelsHandler function is also there.\n\nI\n```yaml\n❯ curl http://localhost:11434/v1/models | jq\n  % Total    % Received % Xferd  Average Speed   Time    Time     Time  Current\n                                 Dload  Upload   Total   Spent    Left  Speed\n100   226  100   226    0     0  33776      0 --:--:-- --:--:-- --:--:--  110k\n{\n  \"object\": \"list\",\n  \"data\": [\n    {\n      \"id\": \"codegpt/deepseek-coder-1.3b-typescript:latest\",\n      \"object\": \"model\",\n      \"created\": 1707753573,\n      \"owned_by\": \"ollama\"\n    },\n    {\n      \"id\": \"deepseek-coder:6.7b\",\n      \"object\": \"model\",\n      \"created\": 1705498161,\n      \"owned_by\": \"ollama\"\n    }\n \n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"`/v1/models` OpenAI compatibility API\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Add openaAI API **v1/models** endpoint compatibility.\n\nSee spec at: https://platform.openai.com/docs/api-reference/models/list\n\nPersonally I am not so sure about putting the ListModelsHandlerOpenAI method into the router file, however the original ollama ListModelsHandler function is also there.\n\nI generally don't write go, so sorry for any weird things.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "❯ curl http://localhost:11434/v1/models | jq\n  % Total    % Received % Xferd  Average Speed   Time    Time     Time  Current\n                                 Dload  Upload   Total   Spent    Left  Speed\n100   226  100   226    0     0  33776      0 --:--:-- --:--:-- --:--:--  110k\n{\n  \"object\": \"list\",\n  \"data\": [\n    {\n      \"id\": \"codegpt/deepseek-coder-1.3b-typescript:latest\",\n      \"object\": \"model\",\n      \"created\": 1707753573,\n      \"owned_by\": \"ollama\"\n    },\n    {\n      \"id\": \"deepseek-coder:6.7b\",\n      \"object\": \"model\",\n      \"created\": 1705498161,\n      \"owned_by\": \"ollama\"\n    }\n  ]\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "ollama",
+      "community",
+      "llm-serving",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "ollama"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],

+      "feature"
+    ],

+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/ollama/ollama/issues/2430",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/ollama/ollama",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/ollama/ollama/pull/5007"
+    },
+    "reactions": 17,
+    "comments": 3,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "ollama"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working ollama installation or development environment."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-14T06:41:51.590Z",
